channel.title: Comments for page "Please, Say My Name"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Please, Say My Name"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is the kinda stuff that makes me feel bad. Is it weird I feel bad for ++|+++++|++|+….

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Never thought what would happen to ●●|●●●●●|●●|● after 3449 took away all communication. ●●|●●●●●|●●|● is now effectively neutralized now I guess. Albiet depressing, he's just stuck there, forever alone.

poor 2521

also +1

item.title: Author Post
item.wikidot:authorName: J E S T E R
item.content:encoded:
Hello there,

3rd Article for the site. My little thought experiment on SCP-2521 in a post-SCP-3449 world.

Credit to l33tr for reminding me I rushed the first draft of this and telling me what to fix.

Thanks for reading, and I hope you enjoyed it.
